notes: This is a frontend-only application with simulated API operations
All tracked files contain API-related patterns that will need backend implementation
Authentication is currently simulated in Login.tsx and AppContext.tsx
AI operations are simulated in AIChatInterface.tsx using slash commands
Document operations are simulated in CaseTreeExplorer.tsx and DocumentViewer.tsx
Form management is simulated in FormViewer.tsx
Case management is simulated in AppContext.tsx with mock data from mockData.ts
React Query is configured in App.tsx but not yet used for actual API calls

ready_for_api: React Query client configured in App.tsx
UI components ready for async data loading
migration_required: Replace mock data with API service layer
Implement authentication context with token management
Update all components to use React Query hooks
Add loading and error states to all data fetching
Implement file upload with actual multipart/form-data
